\tzpentry{ID3908}{Berry-Phase Field Strength Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3908 introduces Berry-Phase Field Strength Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mathbf{F}_{\text{Berry}} = \nabla \times \langle n|\nabla|n\rangle$
\]
